title: Lambda (shuttle)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Lambda_shu.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Lambda'' leaving [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']].]]
The [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] '''''Lambda''''' served aboard [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']] during the [[Battle for Honor]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shuttle ''Lambda'' ferried one of Harkov's officers to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|Calamari Cruiser]] [[Margaret (starship)|''Margaret'']]. With his [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptor]], [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], having been betrayed by Harkov, inspected ''Lambda'' immediately following Harkov's attempt on his life.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
